title: The EVERYTHING Mod
description: this mod will have everything i want in minecraft
body:
Right now, this mod truly lives up to its name by adding one essential thing missing from Minecraft: TOMATOES. Grow them, eat them, throw them at your friends—the possibilities are endless! (Well, almost.)

But don't be fooled! This is just the beginning. The Everything Minecraft Mod will soon expand to include more insane features, because why stop at tomatoes when you can have absolute chaos? Stay tuned for more updates as this mod grows… like a well-watered tomato plant. 🌱🍅

Download now and become a tomato farmer! 🔥
